items.title: Anthropic Startup Program
items.note: Up to $25K self-serve (rolling, ~2wk review); up to $100K+ via VC/accelerator referral; no equity

items.title: OpenAI startup credits
items.note: ~$2,500 self-serve via Ramp; up to $500K no-equity or +$1.5M equity track via partners

items.title: Other AI providers (Mistral, Together AI, etc.)

items.title: AWS Activate
items.note: Founders tier $1K; Portfolio tier up to $100K; Gen-AI tier up to $300K

items.title: Google Cloud for Startups
items.note: Up to $200K over 2 years; AI-First up to $350K total; unfunded Start tier up to $2K

items.title: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
items.note: Up to $150K in Azure credits, no VC backing required; includes GitHub Enterprise + Visual Studio Enterprise
